data.body: bdbe DONE: committed 2cb10893f (stacked on df83). _retry_probe seam added to _with_index_lock_retry; 3 contended tests rewritten deterministic (release-after-first-fail via probe, assert >=2 attempts + first-failure-is-index.lock); 2 non-lock-not-retried tests added. RED/teeth: disabling probe -> ride-out tests fail (lock never released, write fails hard) confirming they require the retry path. 12 targeted tests green, lint+typecheck green. Change-Id+trailers present.
